member.summary: Deletes all locally cached static files for a tenant.

member.summary: Downloads tenant static files from blob storage into the local cache.
member.param: When true, skip blobs whose cached file size already matches.

member.summary: Maps a web static file subpath (e.g. /report/index.html) to the blob object name used in tenant storage (e.g. wwwroot/report/index.html).
member.param: Request path relative to site root.
member.returns: Blob name within the tenant container.
